definitionQuery: (TrailName NOT IN ('Boise Peak Rd', 'Robie Creek Rd', 'Chair Connector Road') OR TrailName IS NULL) And (R2R_Use NOT IN ('Access Road') Or R2R_Use IS NULL) And (SystemName NOT LIKE '%Bogus Basin%' Or SystemName IS NULL Or R2R_Use <> 'Bike Only')
